title: Fixes #11728 Remove gvproxy listen argument
body:
Signed-off-by: Gábor Lipták <gliptak@gmail.com>

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name.  Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *gliptak* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **mheon** after the PR has been reviewed. You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @mheon` in a comment when ready. Thanks @gliptak 
Could you add a little more information to your commit to explain that this is no longer needed.  Also add
[NO NEW TEST NEEDED] to make the tests happy.
LGTM
@rhatdan thank you for the pointers. How would an "integration" test look to cover this?

It does not make sense to change this in the podman-machine-cni repo because I plan to move the code into podman to fix a variety of issues.
Hopefully I get this done this week.
